items.title: Narottam Mishra summoned to Bhopal day after protests rock Datia over ticket denial
items.summary: Supporters of the leader blocked National Highway-44, clashed with the police and resorted to stone pelting and vandalism

items.title: Polish PM pledges memorial to victims of WW2 'genocide by Ukrainian nationalists'
items.summary: Warsaw and Kyiv have for decades been at loggerheads over the killings of many thousands of civilians during World War Two.

items.title: Thousands gather in Srebrenica to mark 31 years since genocide
items.summary: Ten newly identified victims were buried as the more than 8,000 Bosnian Muslim men and boys killed were remembered.
